items.title: The Boring Stuff is Dangerous Now
items.summary: AI agents capable of discovering and exploiting obscure vulnerabilities are emerging alongside developers producing vast amounts of potentially flawed AI-generated code, forcing defenders to adapt accordingly.

items.title: Brivo launches AI-friendly API for security integrations

items.title: Synack report says vulnerability testing gap widens
items.summary: Enterprises are testing only about 32% of their attack surface, leaving many assets outside regular security checks as threats grow faster.
